title: Countered's Accurate Hitboxes
description: A mod that changes hit calculation to use the actual entity model
body:
# Countered's Accurate Hitboxes

**Countered's Accurate Hitboxes** improves Minecraft's combat precision by using the actual 3D models of entities as their hitboxes.

Instead of relying on the oversized, boxy default hitboxes, this mod uses the real shape of mobs — including limbs, wings, and other parts — to make hits feel fair, realistic, and visually accurate.

This even works for modded entities!

***

### **Follow Countered for Updates!**

Stay updated with the latest news, sneak peeks, and community showcases:

*   **Twitter (X):** [https://twitter.com/RealCountered](https://twitter.com/RealCountered)
*   **Bluesky:** [https://bsky.app/profile/coun7ered.bsky.social](https://bsky.app/profile/coun7ered.bsky.social)
*   **GitHub:** [https://github.com/Coun7ered/countereds-accurate-hitboxes-template-1.21.1](https://github.com/Coun7ered/countereds-accurate-hitboxes-template-1.21.1)
*   **Donate via PayPal:** [https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted\_button\_id=M6JCVGPEDKKDS](https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=M6JCVGPEDKKDS)

***

Additional Information:

This isn't yet implemented for all mobs and might still be buggy.

It's currently only implemented for players looking at entities but will also be implemented for projectiles in the future

Note that f3 still shows the default bounding box
